config.arch_notes: MRI+Clinical fusion: ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + ClinicalEncoder MLP(5→64→128). Gated fusion: gate=sigmoid(Linear(128,128)) applied to MRI feat, concat(gated_mri, clinical)→Linear(256,5). 5-fold CV on 100 patients. CosineAnnealingLR T_max=200. DROPOUT=0.5. WD=0.05. H+V flip. Standard CE. TTA=8 passes. LR=5e-4. BS=8. Clinical z-score normalization (5 features).
